hook_en: Watch how these tiny seeds transform with water!
hook_es: ¡Mira cómo estas pequeñas semillas se transforman con agua!
key_message: Chia seeds absorb 12x their weight in water, providing hydration and making nutrients more bioavailable.
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Chia Seeds — Absorb 12x their weight in water — great for hydration and satiety (Tip: Soak for 15+ minutes to form a gel — makes nutrients more bioavailable)

title_en: Maximize Chia Seed Benefits in 3 Easy Steps!
title_es: ¡Maximiza los Beneficios de las Semillas de Chía en 3 Pasos Fáciles!
hook_en: Did you know chia seeds can boost hydration?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que las semillas de chía pueden mejorar la hidratación?
key_message: Soaking chia seeds for 15+ minutes boosts their nutritional value and promotes satiety.
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Chia Seeds — Absorb 12x their weight in water — great for hydration and satiety (Tip: Soak for 15+ minutes to form a gel — makes nutrients more bioavailable)
